Just 2 more days.

2 more days and the videos he took of them wouldn't just be videos anymore.

2 more days and he could finally hold them in his arms.

Just 2 more days and he could finally fill them up with his seed.

He just needs to be patient, and he's sure 2 days will pass quickly.

I recommend reading the description for more information ^^
